case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. SEAVIEW INSURANCE COMPANY

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SEAVIEW INSURANCE COMPANY $25,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $450.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $25,450.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY AMENDED JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SEAVIEW INSURANCE COMPANY $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,225.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
AMENDED REQUEST FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT SEAVIEW INSURANCE COMPANY
SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT SEAVIEW INSURANCE COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
